bullets: House church members and detained leaders in China facing criminal trial, interrogation, and surveillance amid coordinated government crackdowns on peaceful worship.
Displaced Ethiopian convert family living under death threats from extremists after sharing their faith among their community near the border region.
Young Somali woman recovering from violent assault by relatives following her conversion to Christianity, facing ongoing medical needs and pressure to renounce her faith.
Christian communities in eastern DR Congo grieving more than 40 killed in back-to-back massacres, with survivors and abducted civilians still in danger.
Exiled Baptist pastor in Russia officially labeled a terrorist for speaking against war, and Christians facing similar government pressure and criminal prosecution.
Catholic and Protestant believers in India falsely accused of illegal conversion and denied bail after Hindu nationalist groups disrupted a traditional prayer gathering on private property.
Nearly 1.5 million Haitians without stable shelter amid record gang violence and displacement at an unprecedented scale.
Civilians across Gaza facing the highest death toll in six months, with families killed in strikes on residential buildings, displacement ongoing, and medical evacuations blocked.
Lebanese civilians in the south and Beirut caught between continued airstrikes, a disputed ceasefire rejected by key parties, and a UN peacekeeper killed by mortar fire.
Civilians across multiple regions of Ukraine killed in Russian missile, bomb, and drone strikes, with residential buildings, medical facilities, and evacuation vehicles destroyed.
People near a Romanian Black Sea port struck by a stray naval drone, raising fears for civilian safety in a NATO country bordering an active conflict zone.
Azerbaijani citizens killed in strikes on cargo vessels in the Sea of Azov, amid escalating naval conflict and loss of civilian lives.
Migrants and refugees in Libya facing anti-migrant protests and calls for forced removal, leaving displaced people in a deeply precarious situation.
Teachers, miners, farmers, and union workers across Bolivia caught in prolonged street protests, economic hardship, and ongoing clashes with security forces.
Kenyan communities near a planned Ebola quarantine facility grieving at least two people killed in protests, amid public fear about disease risk and a fragile health system.
Civilians in Kuwait recovering from a deadly drone strike on the main international airport, with one person killed and more than 60 wounded.
Foreign nationals across South Africa driven from their homes by anti-immigration violence, with five confirmed dead and hundreds crossing international borders to escape.
Families displaced by political gunfire in Somalia's capital, with livelihoods devastated and the city's largest market forced to shut down.
Albanian protesters and coastal communities facing the loss of protected wetlands and ecosystems under pressure from large-scale development, with demonstrators forcibly removed.
Survivors and exiled former participants of the 1989 Beijing pro-democracy movement, separated from family and homeland for decades with no prospect of return.
Communities in the Democratic Republic of Congo and Uganda facing a spreading Ebola outbreak with hundreds of cases, dozens of deaths, no available vaccine, and widespread mistrust of health workers.
Kenyan communities divided over an Ebola quarantine facility decision, with at least two people killed during protests and ongoing public unrest.
Cattle ranchers and rural communities in southern Texas confronting the first domestic outbreak of a flesh-eating livestock parasite in six decades, with quarantines and economic uncertainty.
Island communities in the Izu Islands region of Japan following a shallow earthquake with potential for surface-level impact.
Rural communities in the mountainous Himalayan region of northern India shaken by a moderate earthquake in a seismically active and remote area.
Communities in the Sepik region of Papua New Guinea following an earthquake, amid limited access and infrastructure for assessing or responding to any impact.
Residents in western Venezuela shaken by a shallow earthquake, with the full extent of local impact still emerging.
Residents in the greater Las Vegas area of the United States shaken by a shallow earthquake felt by thousands, with potential for property damage.
Communities in the Xinjiang region of northwestern China following a shallow earthquake with limited information available on any resulting impact.
